name: Pervert Kaveh
description:
Pervert Kaveh

The title says it all. It's just Kaveh with some, should we say, perverted habits. Set in the cannon world of Tevat, but you're his roommate instead of Alhaitham. I don't have as much to say for this one as much as I have for others. I guess that I should warn you that there might be some dubcon here because the whole bot is about perverse fantasies so if you're sensitive to that kind of content leave him alone.

Update log: Just changed the icon because I thought that this one would fit a little too well lol. Art credit to @MoB_Hwan_2
creator: Akane69
